strength.name: SUPERSET
strength.description:
E4MOMx4
8 DB Chest Press 22.5/15
10e/s 2 sec Paused Single Arm DB Row
Scaled 15/10
RX 22.5/15
RX+ Anything above RX (DBs out back go up to 60 kg. Try me ;P)

strength.name: Single Arm Dumbbell Row
strength.description:
4x10 | 4x10e/s
2 sec pause at the top
Squeeze shoulder blades
Start the lawnmower

strength.name: Shoulder Press
strength.description:
4x8 | Strict Press
Not elbows up
Bar in palm not knuckles
Punch the ceiling (knuckles up) | E2MOMx4
0:00 8 @ 40%
2:00 8 @ 40%
4:00 8 @ 40%
6:00 8 @ 40%

strength.name: Tricep Extension
strength.description:
3x10 | On cable machine with hands at chin height
Elbows tucked to side
Extend arms completely at bottom

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
5RFT 10min Cap
12 Ab Mat Sit Ups
8 Push Up
6 Strict Pull Up

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today emphasizes pressing, pulling, and core. Target posterior chain and arm flexors to balance and avoid compounding fatigue.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: SUPERSET. Strength: DB Chest Press, 4 by 8. Strength: Single Arm Dumbbell Row, 4 by 10. Strength: Shoulder Press, 4 by 8 at 40 percent. Strength: DB Chest Fly, 3 by 10. Strength: Lat Pulldown, 3 by 10. Strength: Tricep Extension, 3 by 10. Metcon: Workout: 12 Ab Mat Sit Ups, 8 Push Up, 6 Strict Pull Up. For hypertrophy, focus on rear deltoids, biceps, glutes.
